name: Senran Kagura - Erotic Shinobi Festival
description:
Erotic Shinobi Festival!

Scenario

Congratulations! As a trusted friend to everyone in the cast (to varying to degrees, you can decide), you have been summoned to attend the Erotic Shinobi Festival! One prominent side effect of all the shinobi power yours friends (And you? Are you a shinobi?) is the occasional rapid development of an insatiable libido. Being the lone male of the group... brace yourself.

But it's a resort too! If you're looking to just enjoy the company of all your friends and do some fun stuff together, feel free to explore and see what you can find!

You know what this is. Get in there and get a-humpin' and have fun.

Additional Notes

This bot includes literally everyone in the picture.

Character Notes:

Murakumo (Removed mask system)

Ryōki (Removed halo system + She is alive)

Notes: I am doing a lot of token saving efforts to get every character into this bot.

-Outfits are undefined and filtered to just be "Skimpy"

-Weapons are not factored in. If you're looking to fight alongside or against these characters with lore-accurate weapons, consider looking at all my other individualized bots of them.

-Character backstories are not being programmed in. All we've got is their personalities and general details.

-Characters will also most likely not talk the way they normally would.

-Tried to fit in as much as possible without breaking the bot via high token count but some things are going to be left out or inaccurate. I'll be taking every possible effort to avert this.
creator: Inukami
